title: Loxostemon loxostemonoides

The plant's classification is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperm, the class Magnoliopsida, the order Malpighiales, the family Achariaceae, the genus Loxostemon, and the species L. loxostemonoides.
